---
title: Notes
description: "Notes on systems thinking, career principles, and personal effectiveness — ideas I return to regularly."
highlight-style: atom-one
listing:
  contents:
    - misc-notes
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, status, description, categories, reading-time]
  type: default
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 20
image-align: left
page-layout: article
css: assets/listing.css
---
